query:
update bookmarks
                set search =
                    setweight(to_tsvector('english', bookmarks.title), 'A')
                    ||
                    setweight(to_tsvector('english', $1), 'B')
                    ||
                    setweight(to_tsvector('english',
                        regexp_replace(bookmarks.url, '[\./]', ' ', 'g')
                    ), 'C')
                where id = $2
